title: NMSA 1-1-1.1. Purpose of [Election] Code
text:
1-1-1.1. Purpose of [Election] Code. 
It is the purpose of the Election Code [Chapter 1 NMSA 1978] to secure the secrecy of the 
ballot, the purity of elections and guard against the abuse of the elective franchise. It is also the 
purpose of the Election Code to provide for efficient administration and conduct of elections.

History: 1978 Comp., § 1-1-1.1, enacted by Laws 1979, ch. 74, § 1.
